title: Straw Hats Hold the Line
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Black Maria, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Kaido as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all, you're deluded enough to think you can win against KAido- Sama!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you keep this up, you're going to burn down the entire castle!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you worried about your enemies? That's rich.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you care so much, surrender and let us catch you, nice Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Robin-san, can you hold me for a little longer?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't know when to give up, do you?!

dialogue.speaker: Black Maria
dialogue.text: Don't you get it, nice Robin?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You must know deep down, your friends will always sell you out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Blackfoot called You Right to Me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big shots from all over the world are after you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're nothing but a burden to your crew!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's why it was so easy to lure you here!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 27 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
